subject: Anthropic Q1 2026 Update and Claude Enterprise Milestones
author: Dario Amodei
tone: optimistic but grounded, transparent about challenges
key_points: Claude Enterprise adoption crossed 500 enterprise customers in Q1
Responsible Scaling Policy v3 published with concrete safety benchmarks
Three new research papers accepted at ICML 2026
FTC inquiry is ongoing; legal team is cooperating fully
sensitive_topics: FTC investigation — must not speculate on outcomes or assign blame
Competitive positioning — avoid disparaging competitors by name
Headcount growth — acknowledge growing pains without alarming anyone
context: This all-hands update covers Q1 2026 results. The team is energized by product momentum but anxious about the FTC inquiry and rapid scaling challenges. Leadership wants to be transparent about difficulties while maintaining confidence in the company's direction.
